hero.description: Phone, tablet, or browser — play like a Launchpad anywhere. Follow LED guides, create with UniPacks, and share with the world.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: From practice to performance — UniPad has you covered.

practice.title: Efficient Practice
practice.description: Preview songs with auto-play, then learn note by note with LED guides in practice mode. Record your performances to track your progress.

unipack.title: UniPack System
unipack.description: Bundle sounds, LEDs, and auto-play into a single shareable package. Discover and exchange songs with the community.

integration.title: Powerful Integration
integration.description: Connect a real Launchpad via USB and the app recognizes it instantly. Web MIDI support brings hardware play to the browser too.

theme.title: Custom Skins
theme.description: Personalize your play screen with custom themes. Change pad buttons, backgrounds, chain visuals, and UI colors — all packaged in a simple ZIP.

howItWorks.title: Get Playing in Seconds
howItWorks.subtitle: No installation required. Just open and play.

step1.title: Choose a UniPack
step1.description: Browse community packs or load your own ZIP file.

step2.title: Hit the Pads
step2.description: Tap the colorful pads to play sounds. LEDs guide you through each note.

step3.title: Master & Share
step3.description: Use practice mode to learn, then record and share your performance.

community.title: Join the Community
community.subtitle: Connect with creators and players worldwide.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about UniPad.

0.a: Yes! UniPad is 100% free with no ads or in-app purchases. The entire source code is open on GitHub.

1.a: A UniPack is a ZIP file containing sounds, LED sequences, and auto-play data. It's UniPad's standard format for sharing musical projects.

2.q: Can I use a real Launchpad?
2.a: Yes! Connect your Launchpad via USB on Android, or use Web MIDI in your browser. The app automatically detects and maps your hardware.

3.q: How do I create custom skins?
3.a: Create a ZIP file with custom button images, backgrounds, and a theme.json file. Check the Theme documentation for the full specification.

4.q: Where can I find UniPacks to play?
4.a: Join our Discord community or browse Facebook groups where creators share thousands of UniPacks for free.

5.q: What's the difference between the Web and Android versions?
5.a: Core features are the same. The Web version works instantly in your browser with no install, while the Android app offers lower audio latency and USB Launchpad support.

6.q: Can I create my own UniPack?
6.a: Yes! Write sound files along with keySound, keyLed, and autoPlay text files, then bundle them into a ZIP. Check the UniPack documentation for the full format specification.

cta.title: Get Started Now
cta.subtitle: Play directly in your browser — no sign-up, no install.
